channel.title: GitHub Shell Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: bluesky-social/pds
item.description: Bluesky PDS (Personal Data Server) container image, compose file, and documentation

item.title: nvm-sh/nvm
item.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

item.title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
item.description: 《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀

item.title: acmesh-official/acme.sh
item.description: A pure Unix shell script implementing ACME client protocol

item.title: mbadolato/iTerm2-Color-Schemes
item.description: Over 325 terminal color schemes/themes for iTerm/iTerm2. Includes ports to Terminal, Konsole, PuTTY, Xresources, XRDB, Remmina, Termite, XFCE, Tilda, FreeBSD VT, Terminator, Kitty, MobaXterm, LXTerminal, Microsoft's Windows Terminal, Visual Studio, Alacritty, and many more

item.title: WhatsApp/proxy
item.description: This repository contains the WhatsApp proxy implementation for users to host their own proxy infrastructure to connect to WhatsApp for chat (VoIP is not currently supported)

item.title: QwenLM/Qwen2.5
item.description: Qwen2.5 is the large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

item.title: itzg/docker-minecraft-server
item.description: Docker image that provides a Minecraft Server that will automatically download selected version at startup

item.title: google/oss-fuzz
item.description: OSS-Fuzz - continuous fuzzing for open source software.

item.title: DaoCloud/public-image-mirror
item.description: 很多镜像都在国外。比如 gcr 。国内下载很慢，需要加速。致力于提供连接全世界的稳定可靠安全的容器镜像服务。

item.title: pystardust/ani-cli
item.description: A cli tool to browse and play anime

item.title: ublue-os/bluefin
item.description: The next generation Linux workstation, designed for reliability, performance, and sustainability.

item.title: ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-openwrt
item.description: Support for OpenWrt in Amlogic, Rockchip and Allwinner boxes. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.
